Motion To Remove Case From Arbitration Calendar To Mediation Calendar And To Extend Date For Mediation
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff and moving party. Plaintiff's Motion to Remove Case from Arbitration Calendar to Mediation Calendat is heard this day. Court ordered motion granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Jury Trial Date of 8/25/2003 is ordered set. A Mediation Order to Show Cause is ordered set on 6/25/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and to give notice of the Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court signed order. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
